parameters.content:
## ZapTask certificate / document extraction

### How it works (synchronous)

1. **ZapTask** POSTs the uploaded file (multipart field `file`) + metadata
2. This workflow extracts certificate fields with **OpenAI**
3. **Respond to Webhook** returns JSON to ZapTask (waits up to 120s)
4. User reviews extraction in ZapTask → **Apply to site**

### ZapTask `.env`

```
N8N_DOCUMENT_EXTRACTION_WEBHOOK_URL=https://YOUR-N8N/webhook/document-extraction
N8N_WEBHOOK_SECRET=same-as-below-if-using-async-fallback
```

Use the **Production** webhook URL after activating this workflow.

### OpenAI credential

Replace `REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL_ID` on both OpenAI nodes.

### Response shape (required)

```json
{
  "extracted_data": {
    "document_type": "gas_safety|epc|electrical|pat_testing|fire_alarm|other",
    "label": "Gas Safety Certificate",
    "certificate_number": "...",
    "expiry_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
    "issue_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
    "engineer_name": "...",
    "address": "..."
  },
  "summary": "One sentence summary"
}
```

### Optional async fallback

If you prefer fire-and-forget, add an **HTTP – Send Proposal to ZapTask** node after Structure (instead of Respond to Webhook) posting to:
`https://www.zaptask.co.uk/api/n8n/document-extraction/proposals`
with header `X-N8N-Webhook-Secret` = your `N8N_WEBHOOK_SECRET`.

values.content:
You extract structured data from UK property/compliance certificates (gas safety, EPC, electrical, PAT, fire alarm, etc.). Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown) with this exact structure:

{
  "document_type": "gas_safety|epc|electrical|pat_testing|fire_alarm|other",
  "label": "human readable certificate name",
  "certificate_number": "string or null",
  "expiry_date": "YYYY-MM-DD or null",
  "issue_date": "YYYY-MM-DD or null",
  "engineer_name": "string or null",
  "address": "property address or null",
  "summary": "one sentence summary"
}

Rules:
- Prefer UK date formats (DD/MM/YYYY) converted to ISO YYYY-MM-DD
- expiry_date = certificate expiry / valid until / next inspection due
- document_type gas_safety for CP12 / Gas Safety / Landlord Gas Safety
- Use null when a field is not present — do not guess

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o-mini', response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, temperature: 0.1, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You extract structured data from UK property/compliance certificate images. Return ONLY valid JSON with keys: document_type (gas_safety|epc|electrical|pat_testing|fire_alarm|other), label, certificate_number, expiry_date (YYYY-MM-DD or null), issue_date (YYYY-MM-DD or null), engineer_name, address, summary. Use null when not visible.' }, { role: 'user', content: [ { type: 'text', text: 'Document title: ' + ($json.title || '') + '\nFilename: ' + ($json.original_filename || '') + '\nExtract all certificate fields.' }, { type: 'image_url', image_url: { url: $json.image_data_url } } ] } ] }) }}
